GitHubApiData.name: karpov-gateway
GitHubApiData.description: Karpov Gateway — REST API gateway + Next.js console. Go (Gin+gRPC) + PostgreSQL + Redis + OAuth2 (Linux.do) + TOTP 2FA + encrypted credential pool

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: Karpov Gateway — REST API 网关 + Next.js 控制台。Go（Gin+gRPC）+ PostgreSQL + Redis + OAuth2（Linux.do）+ TOTP 双因素认证 + 加密凭证池
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: Karpov Gateway — REST APIゲートウェイ＋Next.jsコンソール。Go（Gin+gRPC）＋PostgreSQL＋Redis＋OAuth2（Linux.do）＋TOTP 2FA＋暗号化された認証情報プール
TranslatedDescriptions.en: Karpov Gateway — REST API gateway + Next.js console. Built with Go (Gin+gRPC) + PostgreSQL + Redis + OAuth2 (Linux.do) + TOTP 2FA + encrypted credential pool.
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: Karpov Gateway — REST API 게이트웨이 + Next.js 콘솔. Go (Gin+gRPC) + PostgreSQL + Redis + OAuth2 (Linux.do) + TOTP 2FA + 암호화된 자격 증명 풀
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: Karpov Gateway — passerelle API REST + console Next.js. Go (Gin+gRPC) + PostgreSQL + Redis + OAuth2 (Linux.do) + TOTP 2FA + pool d'identifiants chiffrés
TranslatedDescriptions.es: Karpov Gateway — Gateway API REST + consola Next.js. Go (Gin+gRPC) + PostgreSQL + Redis + OAuth2 (Linux.do) + TOTP 2FA + pool de credenciales encriptado
